name: v21 v08 mode1 stock canbox + debug raw CAN stream + decoded vehicle/RCTA snapshot + raw CAN TX + capabilities
usb_identity: unchanged stock CDC/proprietary canbox interface; no gs_usb
mode1_policy: programmer canbox logic remains default and runs immediately

sideband_commands.0x76: pop one raw C-CAN/M-CAN frame from RAM ring
sideband_commands.0x77: read decoded vehicle/RCTA snapshot: speed/rpm/temperatures/voltage/brake/gear plus latest 0x4F4 without raw stream
sideband_commands.0x78: one-shot raw CAN TX on M-CAN only: payload bus=1, flags, id_le32, dlc, data[8]
sideband_commands.0x79: V21 health/capabilities response, no CAN connection required
sideband_commands.0x7A: inject one Raise/RZC FD source-status frame into the stock media/source parser

vehicle_snapshot_payload: status, known24, counter_le32, speed_kmh_u16, rpm_u16, coolant_c_s16, voltage_mv_u16, throttle_pct_u8, brake_u8, gear_u8, fuel_pct_u8, outside_c_s16, fuel_rate_x10_u16, odometer_km_u32, reserved2, rcta_valid_u8, rcta_bus_u8, rcta_dlc_u8, rcta_id_le32, rcta_data8
raw_frame_payload: status, bus(0=C-CAN 1=M-CAN), flags(bit0=EXT bit1=RTR), dlc, reserved, id_le32, data[8]
can_tx_payload: bus must be 1 (M-CAN/CAN2), flags(bit0=EXT bit1=RTR), id_le32, dlc, data[8]
hook_policy: hooks run after the stock FIFO read, then return with the stock release-FIFO arguments restored
